ab: kana 2022 amiyan i, madrayadrayar na ceng-vu dratu pakumauwan dra trau. karuwa lra putililr dratu ngalad na tinarainanuwayan kema.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: muka ku kiyumalra dra bangesaran i drekalr. i Insing Babutrulr i, paetreng lra tu kiniamiyan kana ceng-vu dra tatililran dratu ngalad na tinarainanuwayan kana pakumauwan dra trau.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Insing Babutrulr。
en: I interviewed Insing Babutrulr, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: marekakuret mi kandri na kasedean dra saliyusan. auka ku kantaw marekiumaumalra.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: a marekiumaumalr mi i, tu babatiaw ku dra kemay isuwa aw tu pauwayan kantu ngalad. tu pilrangaw ku driya muka marekaladama kantu trau i sabak aw kantu drekalr.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他告訴我他的名字的由來和意義，也帶我認識了他的家人和他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: “daw merukedrang yu dra aasalran kanu ngalad? adri inaba tu itatililr kana pakanguwayan amaw?” kema ku kiyumalr kantaw.
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎？
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: “an temaralutiya i, adri maruwa penatedrelr pungalad kanku ngalad. ulraya driya a trau pungalad kanku dra {In-ciēn-seng}. aw mudaway a sadru a kasaeruwan.” kema kanku.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的稱呼的名字，其他人還會叫我「音先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"In Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: “na tinarainanuwayan temililr na ngalad i, pananaan lra dra naniyam ngalad. tatapes dra naniyam maunan, dra naniyam nirumaenan aw dra naniyam pakumauwan dra trau. maruwaya marekakadruwan na atrebung dratu kangaladan a nirumaenan.” kema i Insing Babutrulr.
ch: Insing Babutrulr說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Insing Babutrulr said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
